name: Party Mix (Karen Kugelman's)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large bowl.
2. Add the rest of the seasonings (Worcestershire sauce, garlic salt, onion salt, celery salt) and mix well.
3. Pour the mixture over the mixed cereals (Cherrios, Rice chex, Wheat chex, Corn chex, Thin pretzels) in a roaster pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, stirring occasionally (every 10 minutes or so).
